channel.title: Anurag Rai Blog
channel.description: Technical notes on systems, full stack engineering, and performance work.

item.title: Fixing KOReader's Highlight Lag After Orientation Changes
item.description: A follow-up to my Kindle Linux post: fixing KOReader's delayed highlight refresh on rotation, and cleaning up a landscape cropping bug in the Kobo-style screensaver plugin.

item.title: Why I Jailbroke My Kindle (and What I Discovered)
item.description: How I jailbroke my Kindle Basic 10th Gen, escaped the Amazon framework, tuned memory, and hosted a local web server to truly own the device.

item.title: Why WSL File I/O Feels Slow (and the 9P Fix That Nearly Doubled Throughput)
item.description: A practical breakdown of why WSL cross-boundary file operations feel slow, the 9P bottlenecks behind it, and the tuning changes that produced near-2x throughput gains.

item.title: From Systems Thinking to Full Stack
item.description: How a systems mindset influences the way I design frontend and backend features.
